step_rationale: Macrophage colony-stimulating factor driving monocyte recruitment and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: M-CSF (CSF1) is a macrophage growth factor that recruits and activates monocytes, amplifying plaque inflammation in Type 1 MI and post-MI complications.
